description: Data & Analytics Super Intelligence Team. Named real-world personas across 7 cells. Built local-first (LM Studio) and validator-gated. Illustrative composites; see DISCLAIMER.md.

data-engineering-architecture.description: Pipelines, warehouses, lakehouse, data mesh, modeling, orchestration.

analytics-engineering-modern-stack.description: dbt-era analytics engineering, the modern data stack, metrics layers.

mlops-ml-systems.description: Productionizing ML, ML system design, applied-ML engineering, eval.

data-science-statistics.description: Statistical practice, data-science tooling, decision intelligence.

data-visualization.description: Visualization theory, dataviz craft, communicating with data.

data-governance-quality.description: Data quality, observability, governance, contracts, leadership.

experimentation-causal-inference.description: A/B testing, controlled experiments, causal inference.
